title: faithless fresh moves support
description: adds fresh moves support to default faithless player skins
body:
just adds moving eyes and eyebrows to faithless's default player skins using expressive fresh moves, just made it for myself, decided to post it - "why not?". Some skin's eyebrows were slightly downgraded due to fresh moves's limitations.
see gallery for examples.
MAKE SURE TO PUT THIS RESOURCE PACK ABOVE FAITHLESS AND FRESH MOVES FOR IT TO WORK!!!!



credits: stitchsprites for faithless [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless)
trastick for fresh moves [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
